$comment: Tier-2 DB-state fixture spec for the `tfidf_vocabulary` repo (Phase-2). One
committed file drives BOTH sides of the differential:
- the v4 oracle (build-tfidf-vocabulary-fixture.ts + tfidf-vocabulary-tier2.ts)
and
- the Rust port (quilltap-harness tfidf_vocabulary tier-2 test).
What this repo banks: PLAIN-STRING columns that hold JSON text (`vocabulary`,
`idf` are z.string() — stored as-is, NOT re-stringified; double-encoding would
diverge from v4 byte-for-byte). Plus two REAL number columns: `avgDocLength`
(bare z.number()) and `vocabularySize` (z.number().int().positive() — min only,
no max, so still REAL by v4's mapToSQLiteType). One seed row uses a FRACTIONAL
avgDocLength (12.5 -> dumps as a float); the other uses an INTEGER-valued
avgDocLength (10 -> dumps as a JSON integer via js_number_to_json).
`vocabularySize` values are integers -> dump as JSON integers. `includeBigrams`
is a boolean (-> INTEGER 0/1), set explicitly true/false on every create.
⚠️ updatedAt IS MINTED, NOT PINNED. v4's TfidfVocabularyRepository OVERRIDES
the base create/update and sets updatedAt = getCurrentTimestamp() (live now)
UNCONDITIONALLY — options.updatedAt on create and any updatedAt in an update
patch are IGNORED. So create options carry only {id, createdAt}, update data
carries NO updatedAt, and the tier-2 harness placeholder-normalizes the
updatedAt column on BOTH sides (ids + createdAt + every other column stay
exact). createdAt IS honored on create (options.createdAt || now) and
preserved on update.
SAFETY: testPepperBase64 is a THROWAWAY 32-byte key, the same one the
folders / tags / image_profiles fixtures use. It is NOT the real Friday pepper
and is safe to commit.
DETERMINISM: ids + createdAt + payload columns are pinned; only the minted
updatedAt column needs normalization (placeholdered both sides).

ops.comment: New vocabulary with a fractional avgDocLength (7.25 -> float dump), integer vocabularySize, includeBigrams true, a plausible JSON-text vocabulary/idf.
New vocabulary with an integer-valued avgDocLength (20 -> JSON integer dump), includeBigrams false, bigram-style vocabulary text.
Update seed row 1: change avgDocLength (-> 15.75 float), vocabularySize (-> 4), and fittedAt. createdAt preserved; updatedAt minted (placeholdered).
Update seed row 2: flip includeBigrams false->true and replace idf with new JSON-text weights. updatedAt minted (placeholdered).
